/usr/bin/ar qc libelevated_soem.a CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatbase.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatcoe.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatconfig.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatdc.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercateoe.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatfoe.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatmain.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatprint.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/soem/ethercatsoe.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/osal/linux/osal.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/oshw/linux/nicdrv.c.o CMakeFiles/elevated_soem.dir/src/oshw/linux/oshw.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libelevated_soem.a
